input: Bulgular: Endotracheal tube tip terminates approximately 4.1 cm from the carina. An enteric tube tip is within the stomach. Heart size is normal. No large right-sided pleural effusion or pneumothorax is detected on this supine exam. No acute osseous abnormality is detected.
